race.comment: Tricky race to end the day. BOHEMIAN DIAMOND (2) has won 3/4 first-up and she looks ready to fire judging by her latest trials. The inside draw is a big tick and she pulled up with an issue when beaten as a $1.80 fav before the break. Can get things back on track to begin the campaign. SPICY THANG (16) won the trial BOHEMIAN DIAMOND comes through and Pike sticks with her from that heat. The wide draw is a niggle, but she comes through a strong form race last start where she jumped the $1.75 favourite. Can go one better without surprising. DARK AMBITION (9) was too good over 1300m last start in an easier race, lobbing midfield and getting over the top to score comfortably. CJP sticks with him and if he continues to improve with racing, he'll be right in the finish. STORM AWAY (7) is better than he showed last time out and cancan bounce back to his best. HEDAWOOD (5) can feature in the finish again despite the outside barrier.
